claim: Agent drives the self-correction loop: write Svelte, run `check`, parse the `dryui-diagnostics` JSON block, apply the hint, re-check, converge with zero errors.
prompt: Starting from an intentionally bad component (raw <button>, inline style, @media sizing), drive DryUI's check tool until diagnostics is empty. Use only the hints returned by check, not external docs.

acceptance_checks.description: Final `check` output has empty diagnostics array.
Final file uses <Button> (not <button>) and container queries (not @media).
Repair loop took fewer than 5 iterations.
